description_long: This shotgun features a compact, futuristic design with a predominantly black body accented by vivid green highlights and a striking graphic of a hooded, skeletal figure on the stock. The weapon has a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, contributing to its short overall length. The upper receiver is equipped with a ribbed rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is short with a vented muzzle brake. The trigger guard is large and rounded, integrated into the ergonomic grip area, which includes two prominent finger holes for improved handling. The stock is solid and angular, with the green graphic providing a visually aggressive appearance. The overall build suggests a tactical, urban-use firearm with a focus on maneuverability and style.
description: A compact, black and green bullpup shotgun with a skeletal graphic on the stock and a ribbed upper rail, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short, vented barrel and ribbed upper rail, with the muzzle and front sight visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green skeletal graphic on the stock, the bullpup layout, and the ergonomic grip with finger holes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid stock, rear sight, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the skeletal graphic and showing the full length of the ribbed rail and ergonomic grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a short, vented muzzle and ribbed upper rail
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded, and integrated with the grip, featuring two finger holes for ergonomic handling
